title: dimacria longiflora
intro: Dimacria longiflora, also known as Dimorphotheca longiflora, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and the treatment of various infections. The plant has been used to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Dimacria longiflora can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
